title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.688 - Duty to continue report, tax payments
text:
355.688.  Duty to continue report, tax payments. — A voluntarily dissolved corporation must continue to file the corporate registration report and pay all required taxes due the state of Missouri until the effective date of articles of termination.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095, A.L. 2009 H.B. 481)
